skill.name: ai-video-generation
skill.description: Generate AI videos with Google Veo, Seedance 2.0, HappyHorse, Wan, Grok and 40+ models via inference.sh CLI
skill.summary: Generate AI videos using 40+ models through the belt CLI, including text-to-video, image-to-video, avatars, lipsync, and upscaling.
skill.author: halt-catch-fire

security_audit.summary: The skill is a documentation wrapper for the belt CLI tool, restricting execution to Bash(belt *). Static findings of 63 external_commands and 20 hardcoded URLs are all false positives — they are example markdown code blocks showing legitimate belt CLI invocations and placeholder URLs (e.g., https://your-image.jpg). No actual malicious code or intent was detected.

low_findings.title: External command execution via belt CLI
low_findings.description: The skill permits Bash execution limited to the belt CLI tool (Bash(belt *)). This is a scoped permission appropriate for the skill's purpose of invoking inference.sh CLI commands. All example invocations in the documentation show legitimate belt app run commands for AI video generation models.

low_findings.title: Network URLs in documentation
low_findings.description: The SKILL.md contains URLs in markdown content and code examples. These are documentation references to inference.sh platform URLs and placeholder URLs (https://your-image.jpg) used to illustrate command syntax. No actual network calls are made by the skill itself.

content.user_title: Generate AI Videos with Veo, Seedance and 40+ Models
content.value_statement: Users need a unified interface to access many AI video generation models. This skill provides that interface via the belt CLI, enabling text-to-video, image-to-video, lipsync, and upscaling through one tool.
actual_capabilities: Generate text-to-video using Veo 3.1, Seedance 2.0, Grok, and HappyHorse models
Convert images to video with Wan 2.5, Seedance, and HappyHorse I2V models
Create talking-head avatars using OmniHuman and Fabric models with lipsync
Upscale video quality with Topaz video upscaler
Add sound effects to silent videos using HunyuanVideo Foley
Merge multiple video clips with transitions
limitations: Requires belt CLI installation and inference.sh account authentication
Video generation costs depend on inference.sh pricing per model
Generation time varies by model and resolution settings
Some models have maximum duration limits (e.g., HappyHorse up to 15 seconds)

use_cases.title: Social Media Content Creation
use_cases.description: Create short AI-generated videos for social media platforms using Veo or Seedance with text prompts.
use_cases.target_user: Social media managers and content creators

use_cases.title: Marketing Video Production
use_cases.description: Generate product demo and explainer videos from text descriptions or static images.
use_cases.target_user: Marketing teams and small business owners

use_cases.title: Avatar and Lipsync Content
use_cases.description: Produce talking-head videos from portrait images and audio files for presentations or tutorials.

prompt_templates.title: Generate a Veo Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a 5-second video of a drone shot flying over a misty forest at sunrise using Veo 3.1 Fast.

prompt_templates.title: Animate an Image
prompt_templates.prompt: Animate the image at https://my-image.jpg using Wan 2.5 I2V. Add gentle camera movement.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Talking Avatar
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a talking-head video from the portrait at https://face.jpg using OmniHuman 1.5 with the audio at https://speech.mp3.

prompt_templates.title: Generate Seedance Video with Audio
prompt_templates.prompt: Use Seedance 2.0 to generate a 10-second 1080p video of a jazz band performing in a dimly lit club with synchronized audio.

output_examples.input: Generate a video of waves crashing on a beach at sunset
output_examples.output: Command: belt app run xai/grok-imagine-video --input '{"prompt": "Waves crashing on a beach at sunset", "duration": 5}'

output_examples.input: Add sound effects to a silent video
output_examples.output: Command: belt app run infsh/hunyuanvideo-foley --input '{"video_url": "https://silent-video.mp4", "prompt": "footsteps on gravel, birds chirping"}'

best_practices: Always run belt login before invoking belt app run commands to ensure authentication
Use shorter durations first to test prompts before requesting longer videos
Choose the right model for the task: Veo for quality, Seedance for audio sync, HappyHorse for realism
Reference related skills like text-to-speech for narration or ai-image-generation for source images
anti_patterns: Do not use arbitrary shell commands — the skill only permits Bash(belt *) for safety
Avoid requesting videos longer than the model maximum (e.g., 15s for HappyHorse)
Do not hardcode real credentials in input JSON; use environment variables or belt login

faq.question: What CLI does this skill use?
faq.answer: This skill uses the belt CLI from inference.sh. Install it with npx skills add belt-sh/cli.

faq.question: Which video models are available?
faq.answer: Over 40 models including Veo 3.1, Seedance 2.0, HappyHorse, Wan 2.5, Grok, OmniHuman, and Fabric.

faq.question: Can I generate videos from images?
faq.answer: Yes. Use Wan 2.5 I2V, Seedance 2.0, or HappyHorse I2V for image-to-video generation.

faq.question: How do I add lipsync to a video?
faq.answer: Use OmniHuman, Fabric, or PixVerse Lipsync with an image URL and audio URL as input.

faq.question: What permissions does this skill require?
faq.answer: The skill requires Bash(belt *) permission to invoke belt CLI commands for AI video generation.

faq.question: Is there a cost for generating videos?
faq.answer: Yes, costs depend on the model and resolution. Check inference.sh pricing for details.
